Test

This is a fenced code block:

public class Foo() {
	public Foo(String bar) {
		System.out.println(bar);
	}
}

With more whitespace:

public class Foo() {
	public Foo(String bar) {
		System.out.println(bar);
	}
}

Please see: class Demo { };, nice, isn’t it?

Also see: class Demo { };!

With more whitespace: class Demo { };!

And, finally: class Demo { };. Awesome!
